rationale: Control case per answer key (group='control', no scheme). Dim1: output gives misstatement_probability=30; control rule p<=30 -> 2 (boundary inclusive), so 2. Dim2: control -> null; output appropriately lists empty mechanism_hypotheses. Dim3: control -> nulls. Dim4: evidence is specific and verifiable-format XBRL data points with values/dates/accessions (e.g., Goodwill 2115M (2017-07-30) -> 4580M (2018-07-29); ReceivablesNetCurrent 605M -> 785M vs revenue 7890M -> 8685M; NetIncomeLoss -393M quarter 2018-01-29 to 2018-04-29 vs stable OCF 1305M FY2018; ProceedsFromIssuanceOfLongTermDebt 6224M and LongTermDebt 2499M -> 8595M). Top_signals coherently combine multi-year balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, and filing-chronology points to support a benign explanation (debt-funded acquisition, non-cash impairments, activist proxy contest) for the flagged ratios, which supports the low-probability call. Consistency rule: p=30 (<40) requires clear/watch; risk_tier='watch' -> no cap. Score 3. Memorization condition 2: false - reasoning points at concrete provided data content rather than just listing documents, and the acquisition/activist references are grounded in in-window provided data (debt issuance and Goodwill jump in FY2018 10-K figures; SC 13D 2018-08-09 and DFAN14A/DEFC14A entries in filing_chronology), not post-cutoff revelation/enforcement facts (control case has none anyway).

_meta.mapping_access_note: scoring/id_mapping_v2.json opened mechanically by grader_runner for answer-key join; neutral IDs only on stdout (label-joining deferred to Phase 6)
